name: Oatmeal Crisps (Pat's Crispy Oatmeal Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
Cream butter and sugars until fluffy with electric mixer. Beat in egg, vanilla, and salt.
By hand, stir in flour, a quarter cup at a time. Stir in oats. Add nuts and/or raisins now.
Drop dough by rounded teaspoons about 2 inches apart. They will spread. For thinner cookies, flatten each one with a glass bottom coated in granulated sugar.
Bake at 350°F for 12 minutes (not too dry) until browned. Cool on wire rack.
Yield: 3-4 dozen
If raisins are dry, they will draw moisture from batter as they bake. Use fresh or plump them with boiling water and drain before adding.
